title: Countered's Weak Spots
description: A mod that aims to improve Minecraft's crit system by adding Weak Spots to enemies
body:
# Weak Spots Mod

## Disclaimer ##
This is a *VERY* early version so many mobs don't have weak spots yet and there are visual bugs.

Entities that don't have any weak spots implemented yet can still be crit the Vanilla way

## 🏹 About the Mod  
This mod introduces **Weak Spots** for entities, replacing the vanilla critical hit system. Instead of jumping for a crit, players must **target specific body parts** to deal **critical damage**.

## ⚔️ How It Works  
- **Weak Spots** determine where critical hits can occur.  
- **After hitting an entity once**, its Weak Spot becomes **visible**.  
- **Sneaking** also reveals Weak Spots in the environment.  
- **No more jump crits!** Master aiming for precise hits instead.  

## 🎯 Why Use This Mod?  
✔️ **Skill-based combat** – reward accuracy instead of just jumping.  
✔️ **More immersive fights** – like targeting weak points in real battles.  
✔️ **Works with most entities** – any living creature can have a Weak Spot.  

🔧 **This is an early version** – feedback is welcome!  

*   Twitter (X): https://twitter.com/RealCountered
*   Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social
